reports.title: Smoke plume near agricultural burn
reports.description: Visible smoke drifting from east side fields toward Island Grove Park area.
reports.author: RiverResident

reports.title: Playground surface extremely hot
reports.description: Michael Vega Park playground equipment too hot to touch by noon. Needs shade structures.
reports.author: ParentRI

reports.title: Broken bench on river trail
reports.description: Bench near Boathouse entrance has collapsed seat. Safety hazard for elderly walkers.
reports.author: TrailWalker

reports.title: Heavy mosquito activity at dusk
reports.description: Swarms near lake areas after 7 PM. Bring repellent if visiting shoreline trails.
reports.author: LakeWatcher

reports.title: Murky water near fishing dock
reports.description: Unusual discoloration in water near Boathouse fishing area. Possible algae bloom.
reports.author: AnglerJoe

reports.title: No shade at soccer fields
reports.description: Saturday tournament — fields have zero shade. Heat index felt above 95°F by 11 AM.
reports.author: CoachMike

reports.title: Overflowing trash cans
reports.description: Island Grove Park bins full after weekend events. Attracting pests.
reports.author: CleanRI

reports.title: Barbecue smoke at picnic area
reports.description: Multiple large BBQ setups creating localized smoke at Michael Vega picnic zones.
reports.author: NeighborSam
